changes.description: Complete rewrite of SKILL.md for SLM optimization. Replaced verbose 197-line skill with focused 148-line version. Removed docx-js.md and ooxml.md reference files (too complex for devstral-small). Added bundled scripts: extract_text.py and extract_docx_to_json.py. Provided a complete copy-paste-ready JavaScript example for document creation. Added explicit CRITICAL rules for common SLM mistakes (headingLevel vs heading, unicode bullets, file path issues).

Added --wrap=none flag to pandoc text extraction command. Pandoc's default line wrapping was splitting multi-word phrases across lines (e.g., 'Design Complete' -> 'Design\nComplete'), causing test failures. Added explicit instruction to ALWAYS use --wrap=none.
